content: Tomorrow (11.26.2021) Ian Nepomniachtchi will have the white pieces against Magnus Carlsen in their first game of the World Chess Championship match.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by carlosalberto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Domani (26112021) Ian Nepomniachtchi avrà i pezzi bianchi contro Magnus Carlsen nella sua prima partita per il World Che
